How To Begin Thinking About Your 	!
6FFF Backend Marketing:
Backend
Module 12 - Lesson 1

-- 1 of 12 --

Module 12 - Lesson 1
The Backend:

-- 2 of 12 --

Module 12 - Lesson 1
“The Real Business Of
Direct Response 	!
Starts 	After 	The First Sale!”

-- 3 of 12 --

Module 12 - Lesson 1
THE BIG MISTAKE:!
Thinking Customers Will Be
Annoyed With You If You
Frequently Present Them With
New Buying Opportunities

-- 4 of 12 --

Module 12 - Lesson 1
“In Many Cases It’s 	Giving Enough Offers 	To Satiate The
Desire (Feeling) Rabid Customers (In “Heat”) Want To
Experience. It’s More About The Feeling Than The Actual
Consumption/Need Of The Product. While They’re In Heat,
You Must Sell Them As Hard And As Fast As Possible.”

-- 5 of 12 --

Module 12 - Lesson 1
“People Will Pay More For 	!
The Same Content 	!
Delivered Via A Different Medium.”

-- 6 of 12 --

Module 12 - Lesson 1
Backend Categories:
•Manual Labor!
•Consulting!
•Coaching!
•Done-For-Them!
•Non-Manual Labor!
•Online Info-Products!
•Offline Info-Products!
•Software/Tools!
•Big Pay-Day!
•Seminars & Conferences!
•Bootcamps!
•Toll-Booth Position!
•Affiliate Offers!
•Joint Ventures

-- 7 of 12 --

Module 12 - Lesson 1
When It Comes To Optimizing Your
Backend Is Realizing That Not All
Customers Are Created Equal. And,
Therefore, Not All Marketing To
Customers Should Be Created,
Implemented, And Executed Equally.

-- 8 of 12 --

Module 12 - Lesson 1
Your Best Customers - Those Who
Purchase More, More Often, And At
Higher Price Points - Must Be
Segmented For Better, And More
Frequent Offers.

-- 9 of 12 --

Module 12 - Lesson 1
Your Best Customers Should Be
Presented With Offers More Often Than
Average Customers

-- 10 of 12 --

Module 12 - Lesson 1
To Have A Rockin’ Backend 	!
You Must Be 	Prolific 	With 	!
Product And Offer Creation

-- 11 of 12 --

Module 12 - Lesson 1
The More Offers You
Have… The Higher Your
Customer Lifetime Value
Will Go… And The More
Profit You Will Make!

-- 12 of 12 --
